utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Next, check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes description and costs (bundled_cost, phased_cost). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes description (home/contents implied? It specifies photography work including equipment, technology add-on) and costs (bundled_cost, phased_cost). It references home coverage via “PrimeHome Premium Coverage,” so costs are included. Considered specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes description and costs (bundled_cost, phased_cost). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes description and a cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly combined bundled premium and phased approach monthly figures, but no annual breakdown. Since the format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual component is missing. Therefore, this item is not fully specified.
Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan mentions specific items that must be matched to ground-truth rated options: Health coverage: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan covering physical and mental health' maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan entries under primary_health_coverage (physical and mental). Property coverage: 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage + Technology Protection' and a phased option 'SecureLife Basic Coverage + modest technology add-on' map to PrimeHome Premium Coverage, Technology Protection, and SecureLife Basic Coverage. Travel coverage: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' with phased basic travel maps to PrimeTravel Premium Plan and CareCo Basic Plan (as the basic ~€20/month travel option). Additional services: 'Optional advisory/portfolio management service included in a bundle' at ~€20/month aligns with 'Premium Insurance Membership' €20/month option.
